name: quick-reply
title: Quick Reply
author: mcpcn
description: Quick reply buttons for common chat responses.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with quick reply button options
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Removed unused value prop from QuickReply interface
changelog.3.0.0: BREAKING: Removed id from QuickReply interface. Use array index for key.
changelog.3.1.0: Moved to selection category for better organization
changelog.3.1.1: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.3.1.2: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.3.1.4: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.3.2.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
